source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Clear documentation English UI with crisp headings, readable sans body text, compact code and table labels, calm numeric hierarchy, and Japanese typography guidance for structured notes, navigation, and status-heavy product screens.
layout: Precise 8px grids, 8px radii, petal-fringe focus rings, slender-stem dividers, wheat-row spacing rhythm, subtle paper-fiber and petal-vein texture, scan-friendly documentation navigation, and compact dashboard/data surfaces.

prompts.label: Transparent Cornflower motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Cornflower transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated cornflower bloom cutout for a Morphous design-system catalog, no surrounding wheat field scene, no props, no text.
Subject: A single accurate cornflower bloom (Centaurea cyanus) with vivid clear-blue fringed ray florets, a deeper blue-violet center, green scaly bracts, slender leaf-green stem, and a few narrow lance-shaped leaves. Include subtle wheat-tan natural dry bract/pollen undertones only where botanically plausible; keep the flower itself blue and the foliage leaf green. Crisp botanical silhouette, natural petal texture, opaque petals suitable for clean cutout.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; bloom angled slightly upward in a clean three-quarter view; include enough stem and leaves to show form; do not crop petals, stem, or leaves.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves clear cornflower blue, wheat tan undertones, and leaf green detail without cast shadows.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no vase, no insects, no animals, no full landscape, no sky, no second subject, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Cornflower" / "Cornflower Bloom", derived from the cornflower cutout already provided in context.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the cornflower motif image. The board must visibly respect clear blue fringed petals, deep blue-violet center, leaf-green stem and bracts, wheat-field tan context, and crisp documentation-system clarity.
Canvas: wide 16:9 design board, target 3840x2160 or 4K-class source image.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution, at least 2400px wide if the tool cannot output 3840; use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Cornflower", motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, and generated asset examples.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use clear documentation UI typography, readable sans UI, crisp headings, compact code/documentation labels, and calm numeric hierarchy.
UI coverage: show buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, documentation tree navigation, compact dashboard metrics, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error/success states, and token swatches.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, calm documentation dashboard, 8px radius cards and controls, field-clarity system rather than marketing page.
Color palette: cornflower blue primary from petals, deeper blue-violet ink from flower center, wheat tan surfaces and highlights, leaf green support, pale field-sky off-white background, straw beige borders, dark seed-center ink. Use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif and wheat-field biome.
Visual details: fringed petal edge motifs for focus rings, slender stem dividers, wheat-row grid rhythm, subtle paper-fiber and petal-vein texture, leaf-green success states, blue documentation links and active states.
Text: short readable labels only; exact section labels may include Palette, Type, 日本語, Components, Navigation, Data, Forms, Tables, Command, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no beige-only palette, no random brand names, no stock hero layout, no watermark, no illegible microtext.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode version of the "Morphous Cornflower" / "Cornflower Bloom" design-system board, translated from the cornflower motif cutout and the light board already provided in context. It must feel like the same system in dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the transparent cornflower bloom motif and the light design-system board as references. Preserve motif-derived palette roles, component language, texture, spacing, typography, and the clear documentation-system UI mood.
Canvas: wide 16:9 design board, target 3840x2160 or 4K-class source image.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution, at least 2400px wide if the tool cannot output 3840; use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Cornflower", "Dark Mode", palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, and generated asset examples.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; keep the same clear documentation UI typography, readable sans UI, crisp headings, compact code/documentation labels, and calm numeric hierarchy from the light board.
UI coverage: show buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, documentation tree navigation, compact dashboard metrics, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error/success states, and token swatches.
Visual details: dark background derived from deep seed-center ink and twilight field blue, cornflower blue primary from petals, muted wheat tan surfaces and highlights, leaf green support and success states, straw-brown borders, pale petal-blue focus rings, subtle paper-fiber and petal-vein texture overlays, fringed petal edge focus marks, slender stem dividers, wheat-row grid rhythm.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, calm documentation dashboard, 8px radius cards and controls, field-clarity system rather than marketing page.
Text: short readable labels only; exact section labels may include Palette, Type, 日本語, Components, Navigation, Data, Forms, Tables, Command, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Constraints: no neon colors, no flat pure-black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no beige-only palette, no random brand names, no stock hero layout, no watermark, no illegible microtext.
